title: Weekly Broker Intelligence: Market, Product, and Operations Insights
subtitle: Gain an edge in the market with actionable insights and enhance your loan origination process using PRO Portal.
keyTakeaways: Discuss rate lock strategies with clients for stability.
Use PRO Portal for pricing scenarios and client options.
Explore Non-QM bank statement programs for self-employed clients.
Streamline loan processes with PRO Portal's live updates.
Monitor loan progress using the visual pipeline dashboard.

sections.heading: Market Snapshot
sections.body: Stay informed with the latest market data. The 30-Year Fixed Mortgage Rate is currently at 6.48%. With the 10-Year Treasury Yield at 4.47%, anticipate conversations focused on long-term rate stability.
bullets: Discuss rate lock strategies with clients.
Provide security against potential rate increases.

sections.heading: Product Scenario Tip
sections.body: For clients with unconventional income streams, consider Non-QM bank statement programs. These allow income calculation based on bank deposits, offering flexibility for self-employed clients.
bullets: Identify clients who benefit from bank statement programs.

sections.heading: PRO Portal Highlight
sections.body: Enhance your loan origination process with PRO Portal. Utilize live pricing scenarios and automated lock confirmations. Manage your pipeline efficiently with real-time updates and tracking.
bullets: Log in to PRO Portal to create and price loans.
Use the visual pipeline dashboard to monitor progress.

metaDescription: Enhance loan closures with market insights, product tips, and PRO Portal functions. Boost efficiency and client satisfaction.
